name: get_weather
description: Retrieves current weather conditions and an optional multi-day forecast for a given location.

location.description: The city and country or state, e.g. 'Barcelona, Spain' or 'Austin, TX'.

unit.description: Temperature unit to use in the response. Defaults to 'celsius'.

forecast_days.description: Number of forecast days to return (1–7). Defaults to 1.
